name: Mortar Pit
prompt:
Vietnam War era 81mm mortar emplacement. Circular sandbag pit with M29 mortar.

Physical structure:
- Pit: circular sandbag wall enclosure, ~2.5m diameter
  - Sandbag walls ~0.6m tall, 2 layers thick
  - Small gap/opening on one side for entrance
  - Sandbags in standard stacking pattern
- Mortar: M29 81mm mortar in center
  - Baseplate: flat circular plate on ground
  - Tube: ~1.2m long angled tube at ~45 degrees
  - Bipod: two-leg support connecting tube to ground
  - Sight: small optical sight on tube
- Ammo: 2-3 mortar round tubes (cylindrical containers) standing near wall
  - ~0.5m tall cardboard tube containers, olive drab
- Baseplate: heavy steel plate embedded in ground

Colors: Sandbags (0xc2a878), mortar metal (0x333338), baseplate (0x444444), ammo tubes (0x556B2F), ground dirt (0x5a4a2a)
Orientation: Opening toward +Z, mortar tube angled toward +Z
Scale: Real-world meters (~2.5m pit diameter)
